GMHC programs are for clients living with HIV/AIDS in the five boroughs who meet income eligibility requirements. To apply, complete the secure and confidential form on [this page](https://gmhc.org/get-help/) or call (212) 367-1057.

Services include:
- Monthly client-choice pantry pickup, offering shelf-stable food items, fresh produce, dairy, and eggs.
- Nutrition counseling and group workshops.

For information on long-term nutrition programs, contact nutrition@gmhc.org or call (212) 367-1420
